evidence: It's one of my favorite science fiction films... even moreso than some of the latest so-called sci fi 'greats'!
This movie is, by far, the funniest science fiction comedy I have seen in years...
The plot was all over the place.
It wasn't one of those films where you could predict each plot twist twenty minutes before it happened.
This pay-per-view had it all. Excitement, surprises, great matches...
It's one of those few sequels that actually builds on the greatness of its predecessor.
It has great special effects. Above all of that, it's a John Carpenter flick, which usually means it's going to be something memorable.
The one star is earned by the movie's supporting cast - the only positive part of the film, in my opinion.
If you want to watch a good Martin Lawrence film, buy BAD BOYS or BIG MOMMA'S HOUSE.
It's one of those few films that COMPLETELY fulfilled my expectations.
The special effects are awesome. Lucas outdid himself here.
There are special effects galore in this movie but it's the witty banter that made it for me.
It made me laugh, cry, and think.
This movie has UNIVERSAL APPEAL. I recommend it to EVERYONE who loves to laugh!

summary: The user enjoys science fiction and comedy films, often appreciating humor and emotional engagement. They prefer fast-paced narratives but show mixed feelings towards narrative complexity and production quality.
